name: Albondigas
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the green onions into 2-inch lengths and use both the green and white parts.
2. In a small bowl, combine the turkey, chopped onion, and egg white. Take about 1 tablespoon of the mixture and form into 1-inch balls. Set aside.
3. In a 4-quart pot, combine the broth, water, tomato sauce, roasted chiles, fresh tomato, carrot, green onions, oregano, and corn. Bring the mixture to a boil.
4. Add the meatballs, reduce heat, and simmer about 30 minutes.
5. Add the cilantro and cook another 5 minutes.
